column1: # separable_words.tsv — 離合詞 (separable verb-object compounds) whose
# second syllable's reading differs from its own default/solo reading, and
# which can have a closed-class aspect marker (緊/咗/過/開) inserted between
# the two syllables in real speech (瞓緊覺, 瞓咗覺, 瞓過覺, 瞓開覺).
# Format: word<TAB>note (note is documentation only, not consumed by Rust —
# the reading itself is always read from word_entries at build time, so it
# can never drift out of sync with the word's own dict entry).
#   - be exactly 2 characters (this pilot only handles single-char verb +
#     single-char noun; longer separable compounds are out of scope)
# Only add an entry when at least one syllable's compound reading actually
# differs from its own default/solo reading — otherwise the char-fallback
# path already produces the right answer and this entry is a no-op.

column2: fan3 gaau3 — 覺 here is gaau3 (sleep), not its default gok3 (feel/sense)
